The AI Stewardship Sequence

The Pathway

We rebuild the human layer first — governance, capability, and shared language — then build the technology that compounds rather than corrodes.

Four mile markers

From policy to platform — without skipping the human work

01

Safety Documentation

2 weeks

$5,000

Outcome: Your AI policy, drafted and board-ready.

  • Policy Framework
  • Acceptable Use Guidelines
  • Board Presentation Deck
02

Sandbox Discovery

4 weeks

$15,000

Outcome: Use cases proven, risks documented, decisions ready.

  • Technical Feasibility Report
  • Risk Matrix
  • Prototype Blueprint
03

Skills Development

8 weeks (cohort) · ongoing

from $4,800/yr

Outcome: Your team trained to lead this work — with credentials and shared language.

  • Stewardship Certification
  • Monthly Practice Clinics
  • Community Access
04

Solutions Deployment

8–12 weeks

from $30,000

Outcome: Your intelligence integrated, activated, and ready to multiply.

Custom CMS, LMS, and CRM surfaces designed for human-in-the-loop workflows.

Why this order

We build the human layer first because technology that precedes governance is simply accelerated risk.

Safety documentation provides the perimeter. Sandbox discovery provides the proof. Skills development provides the operators.

Only then do we deploy solutions, ensuring they land in a prepared environment ready to compound value rather than corrode trust.

What you’d pay elsewhere

Anchored ranges based on industry averages for mid-market institutional strategy.

Service Movemental Big 4 consultancy Boutique AI
Safety Doc $5k $25k+ $10k
Sandbox $15k $75k+ $30k
Skills (10 pax) $15k $50k+ $20k
Deployment $30k $150k+ $50k
Total $65k $300k+ $110k
